title: Spelunkery No Easy Teleport
description: Unofficial addon for the Spelunkery mod that changes the functionality of Dimensional Tears to be less overpowered.
body:
Changes Dimensional Tears in the fabric 1.20.1 version of the Spelunkery mod to teleport the player and entities to build limit instead of their spawn point. All living entities recieve slow falling upon teleportation. 

Should be compatible with the forge version through Sinytra. 

**There are two versions of this mod:** the regular one as described above, and an RTP version that aditionally randomized the player's x and z coordinates inside the current world border when teleporting (thus teleporting them to a completely random place in the world. Note that in a world without a set worldborder this will be likely be millions of blocks away from spawn). 

[Requires Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)
